chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-2708 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on Misc. No.12360/2025. 3. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 30.09.2025 Mr. Abdul Rauf, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Abdul Rehman, Deputy Director (Law) EOBI, Karachi. Ms. Zehrah Sehar Veyani, Assistant Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. The matter relates to Complaint No.835/NBD/2023 apparently made by the Petitioner before the Employees Old Age Benefits Institution, Adjudicating Authority under Section 33/34, EOBI Act, 1973. Per Petitioner’s Counsel, the same is not being scheduled for hearing and proceeded with. He submits that the Petitioner would be satisfied if appropriate directions were issued in that regard. Mr. Abdul Rehman, Deputy Director (Law) EOBI, Karachi concedes that the aforementioned complaint is pending. Under the circumstances, the Petition is disposed of with the direction to the Respondents to ensure that the matter/complaint is decided in accordance with law through a speaking order after providing an opportunity of hearing to all concerned, within a period of forty-five days from today. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
